document.name: Tiny Hearts Play Cafe Birthday Parties
document.shortDescription: Private birthday parties for little ones at a Williamsburg indoor play cafe.
document.longDescription:
Tiny Hearts Play Cafe offers birthday parties for young children in its Williamsburg play space. The official site describes the parties as a fun, stress-free celebration designed for little ones and notes that birthday party packages are available on Fridays, Saturdays, and Sundays.

The official about page describes Tiny Hearts as a welcoming indoor play space created especially for children ages 0–6, rooted in connection and intentional play. Contact details on that page list the venue at 123 Hope St, Brooklyn, NY 11211 with phone number (347) 422-0665 and email tinyheartsnyc25@gmail.com.

The official site does not publish package pricing on the cited pages, so this listing leaves the planning price at 0 until Tiny Hearts publishes or confirms party rates.

Sources: https://www.tinyheartsplaycafe.com/ https://www.tinyheartsplaycafe.com/about https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/68a91a3faabcc92f0f352a75/775e6425-8aba-48dd-a747-3668bf21bab0/DSC02542.jpeg
document.announcementTitle: Birthday party packages available Friday through Sunday
document.announcementDescription: Official site notes private party availability on Fridays, Saturdays, and Sundays.
